name: Chicken Tetrazinni
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from chicken before cooking.
2. After cooking, cut each chicken breast into 3 or 4 pieces.
3. Simmer the cooked chicken in enough water to cover for approximately 25 minutes.
4. Cool the chicken in the broth to keep it tender—place in the refrigerator if needed.
5. Cook the spaghetti noodles and drain them.
6. Place the cooked spaghetti noodles in a large greased casserole dish.
7. Lay the cooked chicken breasts over the noodles, mixing slightly.
8. Mix the mushroom soup with the dissolved chicken broth and sherry.
9. Add sour cream and blend it in.
10. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
11. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F until bubbly (about 35 minutes).
12. Sprinkle grated cheese on top and return to the oven until melted, approximately 10 minutes.
This recipe freezes well and can be thawed and reheated in the microwave. Low-fat products are used primarily, but regular types can be substituted if desired.
